pooling: graph_token_last_layer (virtual/CLS node hidden state, position 0 of final encoder layer -- model.encoder.graph_encoder(...) second return value, i.e. pre-lm_head-transform, matching original GDSC2 graphormer.npy)
notes: Frozen pretrained Graphormer-base (PCQM4Mv2) for the CCLE/PRISM external-eval drug set (omicsdrp ablation drug-encoder variants only). SMILES->graph via ogb.utils.smiles2graph, then HF preprocess_item + GraphormerDataCollator. Reproduction validated against original GDSC2 graphormer.npy row 0 (Camptothecin): max abs diff 6.7e-06. float32; row i == prism_name row i in PRISM_drug_smiles.csv.
